markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.108 — Internal Auditor

(a) The commission shall appoint an internal auditor for the department.

(b) The auditor shall report directly to the commission on the conduct of department affairs.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The commission shall appoint an internal auditor for the department.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The auditor shall report directly to the commission on the conduct of department affairs.
